title: Citizen Portal Surge
subtitle: Public portal traffic spikes during citywide incidents
objective: Assemble a high-throughput frontend delivery path with safe backend pressure control.

concepts.title: Edge Offload
concepts.description: Use CDN to absorb public content spikes.

concepts.title: Backend Protection
concepts.description: Route origin calls through load balancer and API.

concepts.title: Repeat Query Relief
concepts.description: Use cache on read-heavy API endpoints.
